content.passage: LIBRARY NOTICE: All books must be returned by Friday 15th March. Late returns will be charged 50p per day.

options.label: A
options.text: You can keep books as long as you want if you pay 50p.

options.label: B
options.text: You will have to pay extra if you bring books back after 15th March.

options.label: C
options.text: The library will be closed on Friday 15th March.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：通知说所有书必须在3月15日之前归还，逾期每天收费50便士。选项B正确表达了这个意思——如果在3月15日之后才还书，需要额外付费。选项A错误，因为不是可以随意保留只要付费；选项C错误，通知没有说图书馆会关闭。
explanation_en: English explanation: The notice states books must be returned by 15th March, and late returns cost 50p per day. Option B correctly captures this — you pay extra if books come back after 15th March. Option A is wrong because it implies you can keep books indefinitely by paying. Option C is wrong because the notice says nothing about the library closing.

content.passage: SWIMMING POOL: Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult at all times.

options.label: A
options.text: Children under 12 cannot use the swimming pool.

options.label: B
options.text: Adults must swim with children who are under 12.

options.label: C
options.text: Children under 12 need to have an adult with them in the pool area.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：标牌说12岁以下儿童必须始终有成人陪同。选项C是最准确的——需要有成人陪同在泳池区域。选项A错误，因为儿童可以使用泳池，只是需要大人陪同；选项B的意思是大人必须一起游泳，但原文只说陪同，不一定要一起下水。
explanation_en: English explanation: The sign says children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult at all times. Option C is most accurate — an adult must be with them in the pool area. Option A is wrong because children can use the pool, just with adult supervision. Option B implies adults must swim too, but the sign only requires them to accompany, not necessarily swim.

content.passage: Hi Tom, I can't make it to football practice tonight. Could you let Coach Harris know? I'll be there on Thursday instead. Thanks, Sam

options.label: A
options.text: Sam wants Tom to tell the coach he won't come tonight.

options.label: B
options.text: Sam is asking Tom to go to football practice for him.

options.label: C
options.text: Sam wants to change the football practice to Thursday.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：Sam在邮件中说他今晚不能去足球训练，请Tom告诉Harris教练，他周四会去。选项A正确——Sam请Tom转告教练他今晚不来。选项B错误，Sam没有让Tom代替他训练；选项C错误，Sam不是要改训练时间，只是说他自己周四会去。
explanation_en: English explanation: Sam says he can't make it to practice tonight and asks Tom to inform Coach Harris. He'll attend Thursday instead. Option A is correct — Sam wants Tom to pass a message to the coach. Option B is wrong because Sam isn't asking Tom to replace him. Option C is wrong because Sam isn't trying to reschedule practice for everyone.

content.stem: What does this notice tell customers?
content.passage: Due to building work, the café on the second floor is temporarily closed. Please use the ground floor café instead. We apologise for any inconvenience.

options.label: A
options.text: Both cafés in the building are closed for repairs.

options.label: B
options.text: Customers should go to a different café on a lower floor.

options.label: C
options.text: The building work will be finished soon.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：通知说二楼咖啡厅因施工暂时关闭，请使用一楼的咖啡厅。选项B正确——顾客应该去楼下另一个咖啡厅。选项A错误，只有二楼关了，一楼照常营业；选项C错误，通知没有提到施工何时完成。
explanation_en: English explanation: The notice says the second floor café is temporarily closed due to building work and directs customers to the ground floor café. Option B is correct — customers should use a café on a lower floor. Option A is wrong because only one café is closed. Option C is wrong because no completion date is mentioned.

content.stem: What is the text message about?
content.passage: Mum, I forgot my lunch at home. It's in a blue bag on the kitchen table. Could you bring it to school before 12? Thanks!

options.label: A
options.text: The writer wants their mother to make them lunch.

options.label: B
options.text: The writer needs their mother to bring their lunch to school.

options.label: C
options.text: The writer left their school bag at home by mistake.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：短信说写信人把午餐忘在家里了，在厨房桌上的蓝色袋子里，请妈妈中午12点前送到学校。选项B正确——需要妈妈把午餐带到学校。选项A错误，午餐已经准备好了只是忘了带；选项C错误，忘的是午餐不是书包。
explanation_en: English explanation: The message says the writer forgot their lunch at home (in a blue bag on the kitchen table) and asks their mum to bring it before noon. Option B is correct. Option A is wrong because the lunch is already prepared, just forgotten. Option C is wrong because they forgot their lunch, not their school bag.

content.stem: What does this sign tell visitors?
content.passage: MUSEUM PHOTOGRAPHY POLICY: Flash photography is not permitted. You may take photos without flash in all areas except the Special Exhibition Hall.

options.label: A
options.text: Visitors cannot take any photographs in the museum.

options.label: B
options.text: Photographs are allowed everywhere as long as you don't use flash.

options.label: C
options.text: You can take photos without flash, but not in one particular area.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：标牌说不允许使用闪光灯拍照，可以在除特别展厅以外的所有区域拍照（不用闪光灯）。选项C正确——可以不用闪光灯拍照，但有一个区域除外。选项A错误，博物馆允许拍照只是有限制；选项B错误，特别展厅不能拍照。
explanation_en: English explanation: The sign says flash photography is not permitted, and you may take photos without flash everywhere except the Special Exhibition Hall. Option C is correct — photos without flash are fine, but one area is excluded. Option A is wrong because photos are allowed with restrictions. Option B is wrong because the Special Exhibition Hall is excluded.

content.passage: BUS SERVICE UPDATE: The number 42 bus will not run on Sundays from 1st April. A replacement service will operate every 30 minutes between the station and the town centre.

options.label: A
options.text: The number 42 bus is being cancelled permanently.

options.label: B
options.text: On Sundays, a different bus will replace the number 42 from April.

options.label: C
options.text: The number 42 bus will run every 30 minutes on Sundays.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：通知说42路公交从4月1日起周日不运行，将有一个替代服务每30分钟一班在车站和市中心之间运行。选项B正确——周日会有其他巴士替代42路。选项A错误，只是周日停运不是永久取消；选项C错误，是替代服务每30分钟一班，不是42路。
explanation_en: English explanation: The notice says the number 42 bus won't run on Sundays from April, with a replacement service every 30 minutes. Option B is correct — a different service replaces the 42 on Sundays from April. Option A is wrong because it's only Sundays, not permanent cancellation. Option C is wrong because the 30-minute service is the replacement, not the 42.

content.passage: CAUTION: This product contains nuts. Not suitable for people with nut allergies. Store in a cool, dry place once opened.

options.label: A
options.text: People who are allergic to nuts should not eat this product.

options.label: B
options.text: This product should always be kept in the fridge.

options.label: C
options.text: The product is made entirely from nuts.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：标签警告该产品含有坚果，不适合对坚果过敏的人。选项A正确——对坚果过敏的人不应食用。选项B错误，标签说存放在阴凉干燥处，不是冰箱；选项C错误，产品含有坚果但不是完全由坚果制成。
explanation_en: English explanation: The label warns the product contains nuts and is not suitable for people with nut allergies. Option A is correct. Option B is wrong because it says 'cool, dry place,' not a fridge. Option C is wrong because the product contains nuts but isn't made entirely from them.

content.passage: SCHOOL TRIP TO SCIENCE MUSEUM — Thursday 20th March. Students must bring a packed lunch and wear school uniform. Please return the permission form by Monday.

options.label: A
options.text: Students need to hand in a form before the trip and bring their own food.

options.label: B
options.text: The school will provide lunch during the trip to the museum.

options.label: C
options.text: Students can wear casual clothes on the day of the trip.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：通知说学校去科学博物馆的旅行在3月20日周四，学生需带便当、穿校服，并在周一前交回许可表。选项A正确——学生需要在旅行前交表格并自带食物。选项B错误，需要学生自带午餐；选项C错误，需要穿校服不是便装。
explanation_en: English explanation: The notice says students must bring a packed lunch, wear school uniform, and return the permission form by Monday. Option A is correct — they need to submit a form and bring their own food. Option B is wrong because students must bring packed lunch. Option C is wrong because school uniform is required.

content.stem: What does this text message mean?
content.passage: Hey Jake, the concert starts at 7:30 not 8 like we thought. Can you pick me up at 6:45 so we get there early? I'll buy the drinks to say thanks!

options.label: A
options.text: The writer wants Jake to come earlier than planned because the concert time has changed.

options.label: B
options.text: The writer is telling Jake that the concert has been cancelled.

options.label: C
options.text: The writer wants to meet Jake at the concert at 7:30.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：短信说音乐会7:30开始，不是原来以为的8点，请Jake在6:45来接他，并表示会买饮料感谢。选项A正确——因为音乐会时间提前了，所以希望Jake更早来接。选项B错误，音乐会没有取消；选项C错误，写信人希望Jake来接他而不是在音乐会碰面。
explanation_en: English explanation: The message says the concert starts at 7:30 instead of 8, so the writer asks Jake to pick them up at 6:45. Option A is correct — the concert time changed, so they need to leave earlier. Option B is wrong because the concert isn't cancelled. Option C is wrong because the writer asks for a ride, not to meet at the venue.

content.passage: SPORTS CENTRE: The car park will be closed for resurfacing from Monday 10th to Friday 14th June. Visitors are advised to use the public car park on Bridge Street during this time.

options.label: A
options.text: The sports centre will be closed for a week in June.

options.label: B
options.text: Visitors should park somewhere else while the car park is being repaired.

options.label: C
options.text: The car park on Bridge Street belongs to the sports centre.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：通知说体育中心的停车场将在6月10日至14日关闭进行路面重铺，建议访客在此期间使用桥街的公共停车场。选项B正确——停车场维修期间应在别处停车。选项A错误，关闭的是停车场不是体育中心；选项C错误，桥街的是公共停车场，不属于体育中心。
explanation_en: English explanation: The notice says the sports centre car park will be closed for resurfacing and advises visitors to use the Bridge Street public car park. Option B is correct — visitors should park elsewhere during repairs. Option A is wrong because the sports centre itself isn't closing. Option C is wrong because the Bridge Street car park is public, not owned by the sports centre.

content.passage: Dear Mr Thompson, Your parcel could not be delivered today as nobody was at home. It has been taken to the sorting office at 14 King Road. Please collect it before 5pm on Saturday, or it will be returned to the sender.

options.label: A
options.text: Mr Thompson needs to pick up his parcel from a different address by Saturday.

options.label: B
options.text: Mr Thompson's parcel has been sent back to the person who posted it.

options.label: C
options.text: The delivery company will try to deliver the parcel again on Saturday.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：邮件说包裹因无人在家无法投递，已被送到国王路14号的分拣办公室，请在周六下午5点前取走，否则将退回寄件人。选项A正确——需要在周六前从另一个地址取包裹。选项B错误，还没退回只是警告会退回；选项C错误，不会再次投递而是需要自己去取。
explanation_en: English explanation: The email says the parcel couldn't be delivered and is now at the sorting office on King Road. Mr Thompson must collect it before 5pm Saturday, or it will be returned. Option A is correct — he needs to pick it up from a different location by Saturday. Option B is wrong because it hasn't been returned yet. Option C is wrong because there's no mention of another delivery attempt.

content.stem: What does this sign tell customers?
content.passage: BOOKSHOP SALE: Buy any 2 books and get the 3rd FREE. Offer valid on paperbacks only. Cannot be combined with other discounts. Ends 31st August.

options.label: A
options.text: All books in the shop are reduced in price until August.

options.label: B
options.text: Customers who buy two paperback books can have a third one for nothing.

options.label: C
options.text: The offer applies to every type of book in the shop.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：标牌说买任意两本书可免费获得第三本，仅限平装书，不能与其他折扣同时使用，8月31日截止。选项B正确——买两本平装书可以免费得到第三本。选项A错误，不是所有书都降价而是买二送一；选项C错误，仅限平装书（paperbacks）。
explanation_en: English explanation: The sign offers a 'buy 2 get 1 free' deal on paperbacks only, ending 31st August. Option B is correct — buying two paperbacks earns a free third one. Option A is wrong because prices aren't reduced; it's a buy-2-get-1-free offer. Option C is wrong because the offer is valid on paperbacks only, not all books.

content.stem: What does this text message mean?
content.passage: Hi Anna, I've left your jacket at reception in the hotel. I found it under your seat after you left the restaurant. Don't forget to ask for it when you come back! Lucy

options.label: A
options.text: Lucy wants Anna to bring her jacket to the hotel.

options.label: B
options.text: Lucy found Anna's jacket and left it somewhere for her to collect.

options.label: C
options.text: Lucy is asking Anna to look for a jacket she lost in the restaurant.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：短信说Lucy在Anna离开餐厅后在她座位下发现了她的外套，已经把它留在了酒店前台。选项B正确——Lucy找到了Anna的外套并放在了一个地方让她来取。选项A错误，是Anna的外套不是Lucy的；选项C错误，Lucy已经找到了外套，不是让Anna去找。
explanation_en: English explanation: Lucy found Anna's jacket under her seat after she left the restaurant and left it at the hotel reception. Option B is correct — Lucy found the jacket and left it for Anna to collect. Option A is wrong because it's Anna's jacket, not Lucy's. Option C is wrong because Lucy already found the jacket; she's not asking Anna to search for it.

content.stem: What does this notice tell students?
content.passage: EXAM REMINDER: Mobile phones must be switched off and left in the box at the front of the hall before the exam begins. Students caught with a phone during the exam will have their paper cancelled.

options.label: A
options.text: Students can keep their phones if they put them on silent mode.

options.label: B
options.text: Phones must be turned off and handed in before the exam, or students risk losing their marks.

options.label: C
options.text: Students are not allowed to bring phones into the school building.

explanation_zh: 中文解析：通知说手机必须关机并在考试开始前放在大厅前面的箱子里，考试中被发现带手机的学生试卷将被取消。选项B正确——手机必须关机上交，否则有失去分数的风险。选项A错误，不能只是静音模式而是必须关机并交出；选项C错误，通知没说不能把手机带进学校，只是考试时需要上交。
explanation_en: English explanation: The notice says phones must be switched off and placed in a box before the exam. Anyone caught with a phone will have their paper cancelled. Option B is correct — phones must be off and handed in, or students risk losing marks. Option A is wrong because silent mode is not enough; phones must be off and in the box. Option C is wrong because the notice only covers the exam, not the entire school building.
